calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-23-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Plaintiff: Draper Morrow, present in pro per, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Mark J. Whitehead.
After hearing the testimony presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1800 Franklin St., #502 (first door on the left), San Francisco.
Past-due Rent $1,538.55
Holdover Damages $1,846.26
No Fees or Costs, for a Total of $3,384.81
Plaintiff to prepare Judgment.

10: 45 A.M. Judgment submitted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Off Calendar
